productDisplayName: Timberland Men Claremont Green and Blue Check Shirt
description: Checked shirt with full sleeves and buttoned cuffs, with checks in white, black, grey and shades of blue, blue stitch detailing, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar with appliqued brand logo on the facing placket, patch pocket on the left chest with blue thread detailing and embroidered logo, full length buttoned placket and curved hemline
